title: PokeBike [Cobblemon & Pixelmon Addon]
description: PokeBike adds rideable Pokémon inspired bikes to Minecraft, ideal for Cobblemon and Pixelmon modpacks.
body: *** ## 🚲 **PokeBike** ### 🎮 **What is PokeBike?** **PokeBike** adds rideable Pokémon-inspired bikes to Minecraft for exploration-heavy packs, Pokémon adventures, RPG maps, and multiplayer servers. Designed to fit naturally with mods like **Cobblemon** and other Pokémon-themed experiences, it gives players a fast, smooth, and immersive way to travel while also offering useful tools for **map creators**, **server owners**, and **modpack authors**. ### 🚲 **Bikes & Customization** PokeBike includes **four bike color variants**: * **Red** * **Blue** * **Green** * **Yellow** It also includes **two visual styles** and optional **client-side visual overrides**, letting players personalize their ride without affecting gameplay balance. ### ✨ **Features** * Rideable bikes with smooth movement * Animated wheels and pedaling * Improved rider pose while riding * Slight bike lean while turning * Light ground dust particles while moving * Bike bell with its own sound effect * Front bike light with real-world lighting * Visual selection menu for style and color customization * Dedicated client and server config files * In-game config support on supported loaders ### 🛠️ **Durability & Repair** PokeBike includes an optional **durability system** for survival, servers, and adventure packs. * Bikes can take damage from dangerous falls * Lava can instantly break bikes if enabled * Low durability can reduce performance * Broken bikes must be repaired before use * The **Bike Wrench** is dedicated to repairs * Broken bike items can be repaired directly from the inventory ### 🌍 **Decorative Bikes & Mapmaking** PokeBike also includes powerful tools for **Pokémon map creators**, **RPG world builders**, and **modpack teams**. * Place decorative bikes directly in the world * Give decorative bikes custom names * Organize bikes into groups * Move, rename, align, duplicate, and inspect bikes with commands * Convert placed bikes into decorative bikes after positioning * Export and import decorative bikes across worlds * Use markers and nearest-bike tools for easier editing * Ship preset decorative bikes from the config folder * Keep preset bikes separate from manual world placements * Support version-based preset reapplication Perfect for building: * Bike shops * Rental stations * Town decorations * Race routes * Event areas * Adventure hubs ### 🔧 **Multiplayer & Mod Compatibility** * Synced bike movement and speed behavior * Optional auto-return to inventory on dismount * Immediate mounting when placing a bike * Shift + right click pickup for cleaner handling * Lightweight and server-friendly * Useful admin and mapmaker commands * **Compatible with Figura** * Stable behavior for public servers and curated experiences ### 🧭 **Perfect For** PokeBike fits naturally into: * Cobblemon modpacks * Pixelmon modpacks * Pokémon-inspired adventure packs * Story maps and server hubs * Region-based RPG experiences No fuel, no bloated upgrade trees, no unnecessary complexity. Just a clean, immersive, and creator-friendly way to travel and build better Pokémon experiences. ### 🌍 **Localization** PokeBike currently includes support for: * **English** (`en_us`) * **French** (`fr_fr`) * **German** (`de_de`) * **Spanish** (`es_es`) * **Simplified Chinese** (`zh_cn`) * **Traditional Chinese** (`zh_tw`) *** ## 💻 **Game Hosting** Looking for a reliable server host for your Minecraft adventures? **PokeBike proudly partners with [BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/ourstory)**. If you want to explore, build, and ride with your friends on a stable server, check them out and use the code **OurStory** to get **25% off** your first month. Using our partner link directly supports the development of **PokeBike** and the **Our Story Collection**. ## 💖 **Support the Project** If you enjoy PokeBike and want to support its development or access previews of upcoming mods: [**Patreon – Our Story Collection**](https://www.patreon.com/ourstorycollection)
